title: Spot Map Navigation
description: Configuration for the Spot GraphNav map navigation custom module.

mapImageStreamName.title: Global Map Image Stream
mapImageStreamName.description: Rendered GraphNav global map image used as the display layer.

mapImageMetadataStreamName.title: Global Map Image Metadata Stream
mapImageMetadataStreamName.description: JSON metadata companion for the rendered global map image.

graphnavMetadataStreamName.title: GraphNav Metadata Stream
graphnavMetadataStreamName.description: Optional waypoint and edge overlay stream. Leave blank unless you have a small UI-safe metadata stream.

navStateStreamName.title: Navigation State Stream
navStateStreamName.description: Current GraphNav status and live seed-frame pose.

gotoPoseCommandName.title: Goto Pose Command Name
gotoPoseCommandName.description: Command template used when sending an arbitrary map target.

pollIntervalMs.title: Refresh Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.description: How often the module refreshes image and state data.

showWaypointLabels.title: Show Waypoint Labels
showWaypointLabels.description: Render waypoint labels when an overlay stream is configured.

defaultYawMode.title: Default Target Heading
defaultYawMode.description: Heading applied when the user clicks a new target.

defaultYawDeg.title: Fixed Default Heading (deg)
defaultYawDeg.description: Fallback heading used when Default Target Heading is fixed.
